description_long: This is a single black slip-on clog-style shoe, resembling a Crocs Classic Clog, with a rounded toe and multiple ventilation holes on the upper surface. The shoe features a thick, white midsole with a black stripe running around its circumference, and a textured black outsole for grip. A pivoting black heel strap is attached on both sides, allowing for a secure fit or to be worn as a slip-on. The left side displays a small circular red and white logo, while the back heel area has the word 'crocs' embossed in black on a white background. The shoe appears to be made primarily of molded EVA or rubber-like foam, with a slightly matte and grippy finish. Visible signs of wear and some dirt are present, especially around the sole, indicating it is lightly used.
description: A black slip-on clog with ventilation holes, a white midsole, black outsole, and a pivoting heel strap. Features a red logo on the side and 'crocs' branding on the heel, showing light wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, multiple ventilation holes, and the slightly worn white midsole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the pivoting heel strap, red circular logo, and the full length of the white midsole with black stripe.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the 'crocs' branding on the heel and the open back design with the heel strap visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the plain side profile, heel strap, and the continuous white midsole with black outsole.
attribute_logo: Circular red and white logo on the left side; 'crocs' text embossed in black on the white heel band.
